issues.description: The orchestrator encountered a 'partial_gate_abort' during evidence gathering. The test-orchestrator failed to collect tests (ERROR collecting tests/unit/fixture/test_manifest), resulting in an absent test signal.
issues.suggestion: Resolve the test collection error in the environment to allow the test-orchestrator to run and provide a valid test signal.

criteria_verification.notes: No test signal available due to partial_gate_abort.

rationale: The gathering_status is 'partial_gate_abort'. Per the Absence of Failure guards, an absent test signal (tests_run is null) cannot be treated as a pass. The test-orchestrator failed to collect tests, making it impossible to verify the implementation.
